documentationRules.category: Question Selection Rules for Australia Student Visa Interview Preparation
documentationRules.description: Intelligent question selection system that adapts question sets based on applicant profile and answers to optimally prepare students for Australia student visa interviews.

ruleTypes: CORE_REQUIREMENTS - Always included questions for any Australia student
PROFILE_BASED - Triggered based on applicant's education level and career stage
CONDITIONAL_CONCERNS - Triggered when specific risk factors or strengths are identified
SCENARIO_SPECIFIC - Triggered for special circumstances (visa history, employment status, etc.)
FIELD_SPECIFIC - Adapted question focus based on program and field of study
conditionTypes: OR (at least one condition must be true)

questionSelectionRules.name: Core - Basic Profile & Identity
questionSelectionRules.description: Always include basic identity and profile questions as foundation for Australia student visa interview

actions.reason: Basic identity verification establishes applicant eligibility and forms foundation for Australia student visa assessment including age requirement (16+)

questionSelectionRules.name: Core - Study Plans & Motivation
questionSelectionRules.description: Always include study motivation and career alignment questions

actions.reason: Study motivation assessment is critical to determine genuine educational intent vs. immigration intent, core evaluation criteria for Australia student visa

questionSelectionRules.name: Core - University Choice & Acceptance
questionSelectionRules.description: Always include university selection and acceptance letter questions

actions.reason: University verification confirms acceptance letter receipt, legitimate admission, and student visa eligibility, mandatory requirements for Australia student visa processing

questionSelectionRules.name: Core - Academic Capability
questionSelectionRules.description: Always include test scores and academic preparation questions

actions.reason: Academic capability verification through test scores (PTE/IELTS), GPA, and English proficiency is mandatory for Australia student visa approval

questionSelectionRules.name: Core - Financial Capability & Proof of Funds
questionSelectionRules.description: Always include financial sponsor and funding questions - critical for Australia student visa

actions.reason: Financial capability verification is critical for Australia student visa - officers must confirm applicant/sponsor can fund entire education and living expenses without relying on Australian public funds

questionSelectionRules.name: Core - Home Country Ties & Return Intent
questionSelectionRules.description: Always include post-graduation plans and home country ties questions - critical for Australia student visa

actions.reason: Return home commitment and home country ties are CRITICAL for Australia student visa - officers must establish genuine student intent and evidence of commitment to return home after studies

questionSelectionRules.name: Core - Visa Compliance & Legal Background
questionSelectionRules.description: Always include visa history and legal background questions

actions.reason: Visa compliance and legal clearance are mandatory verification requirements for Australia student visa - any visa violations or criminal history must be disclosed and explained

questionSelectionRules.name: Strong English Proficiency
questionSelectionRules.description: Applied when student has high English test scores (PTE 85+ or IELTS 8+)

actions.reason: Strong English proficiency significantly strengthens Australia student visa application by confirming student can succeed in English-medium academic environment

questionSelectionRules.name: Weak English Proficiency
questionSelectionRules.description: Applied when student has low English test scores (PTE below 65 or IELTS below 6.5) or low confidence rating

actions.reason: Weak English proficiency raises concerns about academic success and requires detailed explanation of support systems and strategies for managing English-medium coursework at Australian university

questionSelectionRules.name: Strong Academic Record
questionSelectionRules.description: Applied when student has high GPA (3.5+) or strong test scores

actions.reason: Strong academic history demonstrates capability for Australian university coursework and reduces officer concerns about academic success

questionSelectionRules.name: Weak Academic Record
questionSelectionRules.description: Applied when student has low GPA (below 3.0) or low English test scores

actions.reason: Weaker academic record requires detailed explanation of academic preparation strategies and confirmation of financial support for full program duration despite potential academic challenges

questionSelectionRules.name: Strong Financial Capability
questionSelectionRules.description: Applied when sponsor income is high (AUD 100,000+ equivalent) or student has full scholarship

actions.reason: Strong financial capability and funding sources significantly strengthen Australia student visa application by eliminating officer concern about student becoming financial burden on Australia

questionSelectionRules.name: Weak or Uncertain Financial Capability
questionSelectionRules.description: Applied when sponsor income is modest (below AUD 40,000) or available funds barely cover program costs

actions.reason: Limited financial resources require detailed documentation of sponsor income proof, detailed funding plan for all program years, and clear explanation of how expenses will be covered without Australian public funds

questionSelectionRules.name: No Scholarship Funding
questionSelectionRules.description: Applied when student did not receive any scholarship

actions.reason: Absence of scholarship means full reliance on sponsor/personal funds - requires strong evidence of complete financial capability for entire program duration

questionSelectionRules.name: Has Scholarship Funding
questionSelectionRules.description: Applied when student received any type of scholarship (merit-based, need-based, or partial)

actions.reason: University scholarship significantly strengthens financial capability profile by confirming university investment in student and reducing sponsor burden

questionSelectionRules.name: Contributing Personal Savings
questionSelectionRules.description: Applied when student is contributing personal savings toward education

actions.reason: Personal savings contribution demonstrates student commitment and financial investment in their own education, strengthening overall funding credibility

questionSelectionRules.name: Strong Home Country Ties
questionSelectionRules.description: Applied when student has multiple home country ties: family, property, job prospects, and strong intent to return

actions.reason: Multiple strong home country ties (family, property, job prospects) provide clear evidence of genuine student intent and commitment to return home, significantly strengthening Australia student visa case

questionSelectionRules.name: Weak Home Country Ties
questionSelectionRules.description: Applied when student has few home country ties or uncertain return plans

actions.reason: Limited home country ties or weak return intent raises officer concerns about genuine student intent and requires detailed, credible explanation of why student will return to home country

questionSelectionRules.name: Considering Graduate Work Visa
questionSelectionRules.description: Applied when student is considering staying in Australia after graduation using Graduate Work Visa

actions.reason: Graduate Work Visa consideration must be carefully framed as temporary work experience followed by return home to maintain genuine student intent. Requires clear explanation of how temporary Australia work aligns with long-term home country career plans

questionSelectionRules.name: Plans Part-Time Work During Studies
questionSelectionRules.description: Applied when student plans to work part-time while studying

actions.reason: Part-time work plans require demonstration of understanding Australia student visa work restrictions (20 hours/week during school terms) and realistic balance with academic commitments

questionSelectionRules.name: Healthcare Management Planning
questionSelectionRules.description: Applied when student has documented healthcare awareness and planning

actions.reason: Demonstrated healthcare planning and understanding of Australian state health services shows practical preparation and understanding of Australia life support systems

questionSelectionRules.name: Student Visa Conditions Understanding
questionSelectionRules.description: Applied when student demonstrates understanding of visa conditions and limitations

actions.reason: Clear understanding of Australia student visa conditions and Graduate Work Visa eligibility demonstrates serious preparation and commitment to legal compliance during studies

questionSelectionRules.name: Visa Refusal History
questionSelectionRules.description: Applied when student has been denied a visa to any country previously

actions.reason: Visa refusal history is serious concern - requires transparent explanation of refusal reason, evidence that circumstances have changed, and demonstration that applicant is now clearly eligible for Australia student visa

questionSelectionRules.name: Criminal Record or Legal Issues
questionSelectionRules.description: Applied when student has any criminal convictions or legal issues

actions.reason: Criminal history or visa violations are serious impediments to Australia student visa approval - requires full disclosure, detailed explanation of circumstances, evidence of rehabilitation, and assurance of future lawful conduct

questionSelectionRules.name: Graduate Student (Master's/PhD)
questionSelectionRules.description: Applied when student is pursuing Master's degree or PhD

actions.reason: Graduate students often present stronger credentials for Australia visa - can articulate specific research goals, have clearer career direction, and typically demonstrate stronger non-immigrant intent with existing professional experience

questionSelectionRules.name: Undergraduate Student (Bachelor's)
questionSelectionRules.description: Applied when student is pursuing Bachelor's degree

actions.reason: Undergraduate students pursuing 4-year programs require careful assessment of return intent and home country ties since long program duration and typically younger age may raise immigration intent concerns

questionSelectionRules.name: Employed with Work Experience
questionSelectionRules.description: Applied when student is currently employed with relevant work experience

actions.reason: Self-sponsored student or employed applicant demonstrates maturity, financial independence, clear professional motivation for studies, and strong ability to return to meaningful employment post-graduation

questionSelectionRules.name: Previous Australia Visit Experience
questionSelectionRules.description: Applied when student has visited Australia before

actions.reason: Previous Australia visits demonstrate clean immigration history, compliance with visa terms, real familiarity with Australia environment, and opportunity for campus visits which strengthen university commitment

questionSelectionRules.name: No Previous Australia Visit
questionSelectionRules.description: Applied when student has never visited Australia before

actions.reason: No Australia experience requires extra effort to demonstrate detailed university knowledge through virtual research, shows genuine interest despite not visiting campus, and reinforces commitment to specific university

questionSelectionRules.name: Has Acceptance Letter
questionSelectionRules.description: Applied when student has received acceptance letter from university (ready for visa application)

actions.reason: Possession of acceptance letter confirms legitimate admission to Australian university and student visa eligibility, significantly advancing application readiness

questionSelectionRules.name: High-Risk Profile Combination
questionSelectionRules.description: Applied when student has combination of concerning factors: weak academics + weak finances + weak home country ties

actions.reason: High-risk combination of weak academics + limited finances + weak home country ties requires comprehensive evidence addressing ALL concerns: strong support plan for academics, complete financial documentation, and very clear credible explanation of genuine student intent and return commitment despite weak ties

questionSelectionRules.name: Student from Developing Country with Resources
questionSelectionRules.description: Applied when student is from developing country with strong financial support

actions.reason: Strong financial resources in developing country context often indicate family business or high-status employment, strengthening both financial capability and home country ties arguments for Australia student visa

questionSelectionRules.name: Non-English Medium Education
questionSelectionRules.description: Applied when student did not study in English medium previously

actions.reason: Non-English prior education requires detailed explanation of English proficiency development, specific strategies for managing English-medium coursework, and discussion of university support systems available at Australian university

questionSelectionRules.name: Program Career Goals Alignment
questionSelectionRules.description: Applied when student demonstrates clear alignment between program and career goals

actions.reason: Strong program-career alignment demonstrates thoughtful application and genuine educational motivation, reducing officer concerns about immigration intent

questionSelectionRules.name: Professional Practice Preparation Focus
questionSelectionRules.description: Applied when student focuses on program's professional preparation and qualifications

actions.reason: Focus on professional qualifications and certifications shows forward-thinking career planning and demonstrates Australia education's practical value in home country context

questionSelectionRules.name: Multiple University Admissions
questionSelectionRules.description: Applied when student received multiple admission offers (3+)

actions.reason: Multiple applications and selective university choices demonstrate strong academic competitiveness, thoughtful application strategy, and genuine educational opportunity in Australia

questionSelectionRules.name: Limited University Applications
questionSelectionRules.description: Applied when student applied to one or two universities

actions.reason: Limited applications may require explanation of selection strategy and reaffirmation of genuine commitment to chosen Australian university as primary choice
